description_long: This object is a rectangular cardboard parcel box with flaps open at the top, revealing a coiled or bundled item inside, possibly string or yarn. The box is made of light brown corrugated cardboard, with visible fold lines and cutouts for easy opening and closing. The interior contains a white or light-colored, textured material, which appears to be packed securely. The box has a die-cut window on one side, allowing partial visibility of the contents. The overall construction is typical of shipping or storage parcels, designed for easy handling and stacking. The exterior is plain, with no visible markings, labels, or branding.
description: A light brown cardboard parcel box with open flaps and a die-cut window revealing a coiled white item inside. The box is plain and designed for shipping or storage.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open flaps and the coiled white contents visible through the die-cut window.
description_view_1: Side view with the top flap raised, showing the plain exterior and a glimpse of the contents inside.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with both side flaps open, revealing the coiled item inside and the box's depth.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1 but from the opposite side, showing the open flap and a partial view of the contents.
